docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$80.00) SERVED MAR-27-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, DONOVAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COOPER, SEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, DONOVAN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COOPER, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, DONOVAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
